articles.title: Thousands of Retail Investors Organize Manhunt for Terraform Labs Founder Do Kwon: Report
articles.description: A large group of retail investors are reportedly organizing a manhunt to locate the whereabouts of Do Kwon, the founder of stablecoin issuer Terra (LUNA). According to a new report from the Financial Times, crypto traders upset with the Terra ecosystem’s multibillion-dollar collapse earlier this year are looking to hunt down Kwon and recover their […] The post Thousands of Retail Investors Organize Manhunt for Terraform Labs Founder Do Kwon: Report appeared first on The Daily Hodl.
